---
title: "Schedule"
subtitle: "Eight 75-minute sessions, April 8 to May 4, 2026"
---

The course meets twice a week: Mondays and Wednesdays.

| #  | Date           | Topic                                       | Instructor              | Page                                                          |
|----|----------------|---------------------------------------------|-------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1  | Wed, Apr 8     | Trends in Economic Research                 | Ariel Ortiz-Bobea       | [Session 1](intro/session1.qmd)                               |
| 2  | Mon, Apr 13    | Reproducibility I                           | Lars Vilhuber           | [Session 2](reproducibility/session2.qmd)                     |
| 3  | Wed, Apr 15    | Reproducibility II                          | Lars Vilhuber           | [Session 3](reproducibility/session3.qmd)                     |
| 4  | Mon, Apr 20    | Git Fundamentals                            | Ariel Ortiz-Bobea       | [Session 4](version-control/session4.qmd)                     |
| 5  | Wed, Apr 22    | GitHub & Collaboration                      | Ariel Ortiz-Bobea       | [Session 5](version-control/session5.qmd)                     |
| 6  | Mon, Apr 27    | AI Tools I: Chat                            | Ariel Ortiz-Bobea       | [Session 6](ai-tools/session6.qmd)                            |
| 7  | Wed, Apr 29    | AI Tools II: Cowork                         | Ariel Ortiz-Bobea       | [Session 7](ai-tools/session7.qmd)                            |
| 8  | Mon, May 4     | AI Tools III: Claude Code                   | Ariel Ortiz-Bobea       | [Session 8](ai-tools/session8.qmd)                            |

## Before each session

Each session has a short *Before class* note at the top of its page. Read it the day before. The first one to check is for [Session 4](version-control/session4.qmd), which assumes you have completed the [Setup](setup.qmd) page.
